summary: Completed comprehensive testing of In-App Push Notifications feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified NotificationBell component and Notifications page are working correctly. Follow and message actions create notifications as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: PRC Rain overlay and Interactive Walkthrough modal (z-index 10000) block clicks on NotificationBell when active
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can dismiss walkthrough or wait for PRC Rain to end, or navigate directly to /notifications

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider lowering z-index of PRC Rain overlay or adding a dismiss button to prevent blocking notification bell clicks
OPTIONAL: Add option to skip walkthrough for returning users
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.js correctly implements data-testid='notification-bell' for testing
Notifications.js properly implements All/Unread filters, Read all, and Clear actions
create_social_notification helper function correctly creates notifications for follow and message events
All notification APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Notification polling (30 second interval) implemented in NotificationBell for real-time updates

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, minor overlay blocking issue)

seed_data_creation: Test notifications created during testing via follow and message actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-App Push Notifications feature fully implemented and working. Backend APIs: GET /api/notifications/{uid} (with pagination), GET /api/notifications/{uid}/unread-count, PUT /api/notifications/{notification_id}/read, PUT /api/notifications/{uid}/read-all, DELETE /api/notifications/{notification_id}, DELETE /api/notifications/{uid}/clear-all. Frontend: NotificationBell component in DashboardModern header with dropdown, Notifications page at /notifications with All/Unread filters. Follow action creates 'new_follower' notification, message action creates 'new_message' notification. Note: PRC Rain and Walkthrough overlays can block bell clicks.

GET /api/notifications/{uid}.details: Returns notifications list with pagination (page, limit), unread_count, total

PUT /api/notifications/{notification_id}.details: Marks single notification as read, returns success

PUT /api/notifications/{uid}/read-all.details: Marks all user notifications as read, returns marked_count

DELETE /api/notifications/{notification_.details: Deletes single notification, returns 404 for nonexistent

DELETE /api/notifications/{uid}/clear-al.details: Clears all user notifications, returns deleted_count

NotificationBell component.details: Bell icon with unread count badge, dropdown with notifications list, View All button

Notifications page.details: All/Unread filters, Read all button, Clear button, notification items with delete

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/notifications/{uid}: PASS - Returns paginated notifications with unread_count
